gdpr.title: Data Protection and Privacy
gdpr.subtitle: Exercise your data protection rights under GDPR
gdpr.dataProcessing: Consent to the processing of my data for service provision
gdpr.analytics: Share anonymous data for analysis and service improvement
gdpr.anonymizationDesc: Anonymization will remove all your personally identifiable information (email, name, avatar) but will keep your account functional with an anonymous ID.
anonymizationList: Your account will continue to work
You won't be able to recover your personal data
gdpr.deletionDesc: This action will permanently delete your account and all associated data. You won't be able to recover your account or information.
deletionList: All your data will be permanently deleted
Your account will cease to exist
gdpr.anonymizeConfirmText: Are you sure you want to anonymize your data? This action:
anonymizeDetails: Will remove your email, username and avatar
Will close all your active sessions
gdpr.accountRemains: Your account will continue to exist with an anonymous ID.
gdpr.deletionWarning: This action will PERMANENTLY DELETE your account and all your data.
gdpr.irreversible: IT IS IRREVERSIBLE. YOU WON'T BE ABLE TO RECOVER YOUR ACCOUNT.
gdpr.confirmationTextMismatch: Please type the confirmation text exactly as shown
gdpr.anonymizationSuccess: Your data has been successfully anonymized
gdpr.confirmationRequired: Written confirmation is required to delete the account

validation.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter

validation.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number
validation.passwordSpecialChar: Password must contain at least one special character

privacy.intro: At Transcendence, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our online Pong gaming platform.
privacy.s1AccIntro: When you create an account, we collect:
privacy.s1Acc2faDesc: If you enable 2FA for enhanced security
privacy.s1OauthIntro: If you choose to authenticate via OAuth providers (such as 42 School, Google, or other third-party services), we receive:
privacy.s1OauthProfile: Basic profile information (name, email) as permitted by the provider
privacy.s1OauthPicture: Profile picture from the OAuth provider
privacy.s1GamingIntro: We automatically collect and store gameplay information:
privacy.s1GamingMatchDesc: Records of games played, scores, opponents, and timestamps
privacy.s1GamingTournamentDesc: Your participation in tournaments and results
privacy.s1GamingRankingsDesc: Your competitive ranking and leaderboard position
privacy.s1SocialIntro: When you use our social features, we collect:
privacy.s1SocialFriendsDesc: List of players you've added as friends
privacy.s1TechSessionDesc: Login times, session duration, and activity logs
privacy.s1TechBrowserDesc: Browser type, version, and language preferences
privacy.s1TechCookiesDesc: Essential cookies for authentication and preferences (see Cookie Policy below)
privacy.s2Intro: We use the collected information for:
privacy.s2AuthDesc: Verifying your identity and maintaining secure sessions
privacy.s2GameplayDesc: Enabling gameplay, matchmaking, and tournament features
privacy.s2LeaderboardsDesc: Displaying player statistics and competitive rankings
privacy.s2SocialDesc: Facilitating friend connections and social interactions
privacy.s2SecurityDesc: Detecting and preventing fraud, abuse, and unauthorized access
privacy.s2ImprovementDesc: Analyzing usage patterns to improve our platform
privacy.s2LegalDesc: Meeting legal obligations and enforcing our Terms of Service
privacy.s3Intro: For users in the European Union, we process your personal data under the following legal bases:
privacy.s3ContractualDesc: To provide the gaming service you've signed up for
privacy.s3LegitimateDesc: To improve our services, ensure security, and prevent fraud
privacy.s3ConsentDesc: For optional features like analytics (where required)
privacy.s3LegalObligationDesc: To comply with applicable laws and regulations
privacy.s4NoSellTitle: 4.1 We DO NOT Sell Your Data
privacy.s4NoSellText: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy.s4PublicIntro: The following information is publicly visible to other users:
privacy.s4ProvidersIntro: We may share data with trusted service providers who assist us:
privacy.s4ProvidersHostingDesc: To store and serve our application
privacy.s4ProvidersMonitoringDesc: For performance monitoring and error tracking (Prometheus, Grafana)
privacy.s4LegalText: We may disclose your information if required by law, court order, or to protect our rights and safety.
privacy.s5Intro: We implement robust security measures to protect your data:
privacy.s5EncryptionDesc: SSL/TLS encryption for data in transit
privacy.s5VaultDesc: Secure storage for sensitive credentials using HashiCorp Vault
privacy.s5HeadersDesc: Implementation of CORS, CSP, and other security headers
privacy.s5ModsecDesc: Web application firewall for threat prevention
privacy.s5Disclaimer: However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure. While we strive to protect your data, we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.s6Intro: We use cookies and similar technologies for:
privacy.s6EssentialDesc: Required for authentication and session management
privacy.s6PreferenceDesc: Storing your language and theme preferences
privacy.s6Note: You can control cookies through your browser settings, but disabling essential cookies may prevent you from using certain features.
privacy.s7Intro: We retain your personal data for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations:
privacy.s7ActiveDesc: Data retained while your account is active
privacy.s7InactiveDesc: Data retained for 2 years after last login, then anonymized or deleted
privacy.s7MatchDesc: Retained indefinitely for leaderboard integrity (anonymized if you delete your account)
privacy.s8Intro: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.s8AccessDesc: Request a copy of your personal data
privacy.s8ErasureDesc: Request deletion of your personal data ("Right to be Forgotten")
privacy.s8PortabilityDesc: Export your data in a machine-readable format
privacy.s8ObjectDesc: Object to processing of your personal data
privacy.s8ExercisePre: You can exercise these rights through the
privacy.s8ExercisePost: page in your profile, where you can:
privacy.s9Text1: Transcendence is not intended for users under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we become aware that a child under 13 has provided us with personal information, we will take steps to delete such information.
privacy.s9Text2: For users between 13 and 18, we recommend obtaining parental consent before using our services.
privacy.s10Text: Your data may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your country of residence. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place to protect your personal information in accordance with this Privacy Policy and applicable data protection laws.
privacy.s11Text: Our platform may contain links to third-party websites or services (such as OAuth providers). We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these third parties. We encourage you to review their privacy policies.
privacy.s12Intro: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes by:
privacy.s12Date: Updating the "Last Updated" date at the top of this policy
privacy.s12Notice: Posting a notice on our platform
privacy.s12Email: Sending an email notification for material changes
privacy.s12Acceptance: Your continued use of Transcendence after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.s13Intro: If you have questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or your personal data, please contact us:
privacy.s13Eu: For EU residents: If you believe we have not adequately addressed your concerns, you have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro1: Welcome to Transcendence! These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Transcendence online gaming platform. By creating an account or using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
terms.intro2: Please read these Terms carefully before using our platform.
terms.s1Text1Pre: By accessing or using Transcendence, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms, as well as our
terms.s1Text1Post: If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not use our services.
terms.s1Text2: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified Terms.
terms.s2Intro: You must meet the following requirements to use Transcendence:
terms.s2Li1: Be at least 13 years of age
terms.s2Li2: If you are between 13 and 18, you should have parental or guardian consent
terms.s2Li3: Have the legal capacity to enter into binding agreements
terms.s2Li4: Not be prohibited from using the service under applicable laws
terms.s2Li5: Not have been previously banned or suspended from the platform
terms.s2Outro: By using Transcendence, you represent and warrant that you meet these eligibility requirements.
terms.s3AccIntro: To access certain features, you must create an account by providing:
terms.s3AccOauth: Alternatively, you may register using OAuth authentication through supported third-party providers.
terms.s3SecLi1: Maintaining the confidentiality of your password and account credentials
terms.s3SecLi2: All activities that occur under your account
terms.s3SecLi3: Notifying us immediately of any unauthorized access or security breach
terms.s3SecLi4: Enabling Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) for enhanced security (strongly recommended)
terms.s3AccuracyText: You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration and to update such information to keep it accurate and current. Providing false information may result in account termination.
terms.s3ShareText: You may not share your account with others or allow others to access your account. Each account is personal and non-transferable.
terms.s4PermIntro: Transcendence is provided for personal, non-commercial entertainment purposes. You may:
terms.s4PermLi1: Play Pong and other available games
terms.s4PermLi3: Connect with other players and add friends
terms.s4ProbCheatDesc: Use bots, cheats, hacks, or exploits to gain unfair advantages
terms.s4ProbHarassDesc: Engage in harassment, bullying, hate speech, or threatening behavior
terms.s4ProbSpamDesc: Send unsolicited messages or engage in disruptive behavior
terms.s4ProbImpersonateDesc: Impersonate other users, staff, or any other person or entity
terms.s4ProbLawsDesc: Use the platform for illegal activities or to violate applicable laws
terms.s4ProbAttackDesc: Attempt to hack, DDoS, or compromise the platform's security
terms.s4ProbScrapeDesc: Use automated tools to extract data from the platform
terms.s4ProbReverseDesc: Decompile, disassemble, or reverse engineer any part of the platform
terms.s4ProbMalwareDesc: Upload viruses, malware, or malicious code
terms.s4ProbManipulateDesc: Create multiple accounts to manipulate rankings or abuse features
terms.s4ProbContentDesc: Upload offensive, explicit, or inappropriate avatars or content
terms.s4ProbInterfereDesc: Disrupt the gaming experience of other users
terms.s5ContentText: You retain ownership of content you upload (such as profile avatars). However, by uploading content, you grant Transcendence a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to use, display, and store such content for the purpose of operating the platform.
terms.s5StdLi1: Comply with applicable laws and regulations
terms.s5StdLi2: Not infringe on intellectual property rights of others
terms.s5StdLi3: Not contain explicit, offensive, or inappropriate material
terms.s5StdLi4: Not promote violence, discrimination, or illegal activities
terms.s5ModText: We reserve the right to review, remove, or refuse any content that violates these Terms or that we deem inappropriate, without prior notice.
terms.s6FairText: All players are expected to compete fairly. Cheating, match fixing, or any form of unfair gameplay is strictly prohibited and will result in penalties.
terms.s6MatchText: Match results are recorded automatically and are final. We may review and correct results only in cases of technical errors or proven cheating.
terms.s6RankText: Rankings are calculated based on match performance. We reserve the right to adjust rankings if manipulation or cheating is detected.
terms.s6TournText: Tournament participation is subject to specific rules that will be communicated for each event. Violations may result in disqualification.
terms.s7RightsIntro: All content, features, and functionality of Transcendence, including but not limited to:
terms.s7RightsOutro: are owned by Transcendence and are protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. All rights not expressly granted are reserved.
terms.s7LicText: We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to access and use Transcendence for personal, non-commercial purposes in accordance with these Terms.
terms.s7RestLi1: Copy, modify, or create derivative works of the platform
terms.s7RestLi2: Distribute, sell, or transfer any part of the platform
terms.s7RestLi3: Remove or modify any copyright, trademark, or proprietary notices
terms.s8ByYouPre: You may terminate your account at any time through the
terms.s8ByYouPost: page. Upon termination, your personal data will be deleted or anonymized in accordance with our Privacy Policy.
terms.s8ByUsIntro: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account immediately, without prior notice, if:
terms.s8ByUsLi1: You violate these Terms of Service
terms.s8ByUsLi2: You engage in prohibited conduct or cheating
terms.s8ByUsLi3: Your account is used for fraudulent or illegal activities
terms.s8ByUsLi4: We are required to do so by law
terms.s8ByUsLi5: Continuing your access would harm other users or the platform
terms.s8EffectsLi1: Your right to access the platform immediately ceases
terms.s8EffectsLi2: Your account data will be handled according to our Privacy Policy
terms.s8EffectsLi3: Match history may be retained in anonymized form for leaderboard integrity
terms.s8EffectsLi4: Any pending friend requests or connections will be removed
terms.s8AppealsText: If you believe your account was suspended or terminated in error, you may contact us to appeal the decision. We will review appeals on a case-by-case basis.
terms.s9AsIsIntro: Transcendence is provided "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to:
terms.s9AsIsLi1: Warranties of merchantability or fitness for a particular purpose
terms.s9AsIsLi2: Warranties of uninterrupted or error-free service
terms.s9AsIsLi3: Warranties regarding the accuracy or reliability of content
terms.s9AsIsLi4: Warranties that the service will meet your requirements
terms.s9AvailIntro: We do not guarantee that the platform will be available at all times. We may experience:
terms.s9AvailLi3: Updates or modifications to the service
terms.s9LiabIntro: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Transcendence and its operators shall not be liable for:
terms.s9LiabLi1: Any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages
terms.s9LiabLi2: Loss of profits, data, or goodwill
terms.s9LiabLi4: Actions or content of other users
terms.s9LiabOutro: Our total liability to you for any claims arising from or related to these Terms or your use of the platform shall not exceed €100 or the amount you paid to us (if any) in the past 12 months.
terms.s9UserLi4: Any consequences of your actions on the platform
terms.s10Intro: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Transcendence, its operators, and affiliates from any claims, damages, liabilities, and expenses (including legal fees) arising from:
terms.s10Li2: Your violation of any applicable laws or regulations
terms.s10Li3: Your infringement of any third-party rights
terms.s10Li4: Your use or misuse of the platform
terms.s11Text1Pre: Your privacy is important to us. Please review our
terms.s11Text1Post: to understand how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
terms.s11Text2: By using Transcendence, you consent to the collection and use of your information as described in the Privacy Policy. You have extensive privacy rights under GDPR and other applicable laws, which you can exercise through our Privacy & Data Management page.
terms.s12InfText: If you have a dispute with us, please contact us first at support@transcendence.local to attempt to resolve the issue informally.
terms.s12GovText: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which Transcendence operates, without regard to conflict of law principles.
terms.s12JurisText: Any legal action or proceeding arising from these Terms shall be brought exclusively in the courts of competent jurisdiction in our operating location, and you consent to the personal jurisdiction of such courts.
terms.s12EuText: For users in the European Union, nothing in these Terms affects your statutory rights as a consumer under EU consumer protection laws.
terms.s13Li1: Modify, suspend, or discontinue any aspect of the platform at any time
terms.s13Li2: Add or remove features and functionality
terms.s13Outro: We will make reasonable efforts to notify users of significant changes, but we are not obligated to provide advance notice for all modifications.
terms.s14Intro: Transcendence may integrate with third-party services, including:
terms.s14Outro: Your use of third-party services is subject to their respective terms and conditions. We are not responsible for third-party services or their privacy practices.
terms.s15Text: If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid, illegal, or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect. The invalid provision shall be modified to the minimum extent necessary to make it valid and enforceable.
terms.s16Text: These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and Transcendence regarding your use of the platform and supersede all prior agreements and understandings.
terms.s17Intro: If you have questions or concerns about these Terms of Service, please contact us:
terms.s18Text1: By using Transcendence, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
terms.s18Text2: Thank you for being part of the Transcendence community. Enjoy the game! 🎮
